title: Deliver ROI Plugin v1
goal: Ship a self-contained ROI plugin with local MCP, SQLite durability, local and A2A execution, review-gated drafts, publication, and learning.

assumptions: The implementation remains fully self-contained under roi/.
SQLite is the v1 system of record.
constraints: Do not depend on existing BMO runtime seams.
Support one complete mission lifecycle end to end.
success_criteria: roi:work through roi:inspect works against the bundled MCP backend.
Runs can be resumed from persisted state.
Policy decisions, traces, evidence, and capability proposals are durable.

plans.name: Freeze contracts
actions: Define ROI schemas and lifecycle states

plans.name: Ship execution paths
verification_targets: Local and remote runs complete or pause resumably
